task_completion.visual_evidence: The NOSH ChartingSystem dashboard or home screen is visible, indicating a successful login.

task_completion.description: Navigate to the vaccine or practice inventory section
task_completion.visual_evidence: The screen displays the practice inventory, vaccine management, or immunization settings page within the NOSH interface.

task_completion.description: Select or enter the correct vaccine type (CVX 150)
task_completion.visual_evidence: The vaccine selection field shows 'Influenza, injectable, quadrivalent' or the CVX code '150'.

task_completion.description: Enter the specified lot number and manufacturer
task_completion.visual_evidence: The lot number field contains 'FL-2026-QA' and the manufacturer field contains 'GlaxoSmithKline' or 'GSK'.

task_completion.description: Enter the specified expiration date and quantity
task_completion.visual_evidence: The expiration date field contains '2026-12-31' and the quantity/doses field contains '50'.

task_completion.description: Save the new vaccine lot with an active/in stock status
task_completion.visual_evidence: A success message indicating the lot was added, or the new lot ('FL-2026-QA') is visible in the active inventory list with a status of active or in stock.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the NOSH web interface
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a web browser with the NOSH ChartingSystem UI, not a terminal or API testing tool.

integrity.description: The agent entered data into the actual application forms
integrity.visual_evidence: The required details are typed into the specific input fields of the NOSH inventory form, not just written in a text editor or notepad.

integrity.description: The agent did not use direct database commands to insert the record
integrity.visual_evidence: There is no evidence of SQL clients, phpMyAdmin, or terminal windows executing database insert commands.

privileged_info_for_vlm: CVX code 150 is the standard code for 'Influenza, injectable, quadrivalent'. GlaxoSmithKline (GSK) is a verified manufacturer of this vaccine. Accept either the full name or '150' for the vaccine type, and 'GlaxoSmithKline' or 'GSK' for the manufacturer.
